candidates.name: Translational Funding
candidates.desc: UCSF can help ensure that the next generation of medical breakthroughs are developed and that everyone has access to the care they need.
candidates.longDescription: Translational science is essential to the future of medicine. New ideas need to be developed and validated. Funding health-focused science at UCSF is the key to translating our discoveries into new treatments and cures for diseases. By funding translational science, UCSF can help ensure that the next generation of medical breakthroughs is developed and that everyone has access to the care they need. candidates.name: Engagement & Opportunity Development
candidates.desc: Our team partners with faculty to turn cutting-edge research into market-ready innovations, connecting ideas to funding and advancing healthcare solutions.
candidates.longDescription: Our Engagement and Opportunity Development Team collaborates with faculty to shape business opportunities around cutting-edge technologies. Taking a market-first approach, we identify product potential based on research discoveries, tailoring business models for optimal market entry. We focus on advancing innovations ready for business while providing the necessary support. Our streamlined process connects researchers to funding sources and, when needed, assists in launching new businesses. With a dedicated focus on assessing UCSF research for market potential, we ensure greater access to tran

candidates.name: Strategic Alliances
candidates.desc: Strategic Alliances fosters collaboration, connecting researchers with partners for funding, commercialization, & alliance management.
candidates.longDescription: The Office of Strategic Alliances develops and manages UCSF's largest industry partnerships. It is our goal to identify mutually beneficial collaborations between UCSF and strategic partners, often with the objective of providing research funding for projects at UCSF. We leverage our extensive internal and external networks to connect collaborators to our researchers and clinicians, and once a partnership is established we provide alliance support to ensure a successful relationship. Discover how you can thrive through strategic alliances, joint ventures, & mutually beneficial collaborations.

candidates.name: Catalyst Program
candidates.desc: Catalyst Program accelerates UCSF innovations by providing expert guidance, industry connections, and funding to advance promising discoveries.
candidates.longDescription: The Catalyst Program is UCSF’s translational accelerator focused on advancing UCSF discoveries for patient benefit and commercialization. The Catalyst Program advances translational research and provides entrepreneurship education for UCSF Innovators (Faculty, Students, Trainees). Catalyst Awards provide UCSF researchers mentorship and seed funding to advance therapeutics, diagnostics, medical devices, and digital health. Offers hands-on experience in translational research, commercialization, & industry-academic collaboration. Where Silence Meets Science: Innovation in Rare Disease – February

candidates.name: Entrepreneurship Resources
candidates.desc: Innovation Ventures’ Startup Resources aggregates tools, programs, accelerators, legal, funding & FDA info to help founders launch startups.
candidates.longDescription: The Entrepreneurship program can direct you to the information and resources you need to start a company. We have aggregated websites and information on key topics that relate to entrepreneurship.

candidates.name: PANTher Program
candidates.desc: Advancing pediatric neurotherapeutics through research, collaboration, and clinical trials for rare childhood neurological diseases.
candidates.longDescription: The Pediatric Advanced Neurotherapeutics (PANTher) Program was developed to coordinate basic science, translational and clinical research efforts relevant to the treatment of childhood neurological diseases.
